title: wicked-brain mode.json
description: Repo-mode detection result. Written to .wicked-brain/mode.json at the repo root. Drives wiki location, lint rules, and ingest scoring.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bumped when incompatible fields change.

mode.description: Repo classification. Drives which page set, lint rules, and ingest scoring apply.

wiki_root.description: Repo-relative path to the contributor wiki (default: 'wiki'). Always set, even in content mode — meta pages like taxonomy.md live here.

content_root.description: Repo-relative path to the content corpus. Null in code/unknown modes. Defaults to 'docs' if present, else 'content'.

detected_at.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the mode was last written.

override.description: If true, the file was set by a human. Detection must not overwrite without an explicit override:true write.

score.description: Scores that led to the classification. Informational; inspectable by agents.

reasons.description: Human-readable list of signals that produced the score. Informational.
